headline: “We Don’t See the Defense Demand Waning at All,” Says Honeywell International (HON)’s Jim Currier
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) earns a place on our list of the 11 most overvalued companies according to the media. As of March 20, 2026, 54% of covering analysts maintain bullish ratings for Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON). headline: Honeywell shares are trading higher after the company signed an agreement with the U.S. Department of Defense to increase the production of critical defense technologies.

headline: Lockheed, Honeywell Sign Framework Deals to Accelerate Missile, Defense Tech Output
summary: Lockheed Martin and Honeywell Aerospace have signed new framework agreements with the U.S. government to accelerate the production of critical defense technologies.

raw.headline: Lockheed, Honeywell Sign Framework Deals to Accelerate Missile, Defense Tech Output

headline: HONEYWELL AEROSPACE, DEPARTMENT OF WAR SIGN GROUNDBREAKING AGREEMENT TO ACCELERATE PRODUCTION OF DEFENSE TECHNOLOGIES
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced it has signed a groundbreaking supplier framework agreement with the U.S. Department of War (DoW) to rapidly increase the production of critical defense technologies. This agreement includes a $500 million multi-year investment to upgrade the company's production capacity.

headline: US Defense Department Signs $500 Million Contract With Honeywell
summary: Honeywell commits $500M to upgrade defense production capacity, strengthening its position as a key supplier for national security.

headline: AI: This CEO believes 'human intervention' is still necessary
summary: Honeywell International (HON) chairman and CEO Vimal Kapur sits down with Yahoo Finance Anchor Julie Hyman at the CERAWeek 2026 conference to talk about Big Tech investments into physical AI applications and why he still views "human intervention" as wholly necessary in his company's business model.
